codeReview.summary: Feature implementation is correct. All 8 data columns added to table, filter dropdown uses status_tanaman with TM/TBM/TTM/TLS options, and export Excel includes all 8 columns. One non-blocking visual bug found in getStatusBadgeColor function.

issues.description: getStatusBadgeColor function still uses old status values ('aktif', 'tidak_aktif', 'dalam_perawatan') but is now called with status_tanaman values ('TM', 'TBM', 'TTM', 'TLS'). All status badges will fall through to the default gray styling (bg-gray-100 text-gray-800) instead of appropriate colors. This is a visual bug but does not block functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: getStatusBadgeColor function was not updated when status options changed from ['aktif', 'tidak_aktif', 'dalam_perawatan'] to ['TM', 'TBM', 'TTM', 'TLS']. AGENTS.md documents the new status options but does not specify that badge color functions must also be updated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: BlokListPage.tsx:263-273 - getStatusBadgeColor switch cases unchanged despite STATUS_OPTIONS update at line 35-38

summary: Feature blok-ui-list-update correctly implements 8-column table display (VAL-BLOK-003), status_tanaman filter with TM/TBM/TTM/TLS options (VAL-BLOK-004), and 8-column Excel export (VAL-BLOK-006). Implementation includes BlokFormPage updates with new form fields. One non-blocking bug: getStatusBadgeColor uses outdated status values causing all status badges to render with gray color instead of appropriate semantic colors.
